esportsSportsbook.hintTitle: Sportsbook iframe is not active on this deploy
esportsSportsbook.hintFoot: You can either configure Oddin on the core API (Render) or set VITE_ODDIN_ENABLED plus brand token and Oddin iframe script/base URLs on the Vercel player build. See docs/oddin-iframe-integration.md in the repo.
esportsSportsbook.hint_oddin_disabled: The API reports Oddin is disabled. Set ODDIN_ENABLED=1 on the core service, add ODDIN_BRAND_TOKEN, ODDIN_PUBLIC_BASE_URL, and ODDIN_PUBLIC_SCRIPT_URL from Oddin, then redeploy the API.
esportsSportsbook.hint_oddin_incomplete: Oddin is enabled on the API but the brand token or Oddin iframe URLs are missing. Set ODDIN_BRAND_TOKEN, ODDIN_PUBLIC_BASE_URL, and ODDIN_PUBLIC_SCRIPT_URL on the core service, then redeploy.
esportsSportsbook.hint_api_error: The API returned an error for the sportsbook public config. Check core logs and Oddin-related environment variables.
esportsSportsbook.hint_invalid_payload: The API response for sportsbook config could not be read. Confirm the core service is healthy and /v1/sportsbook/oddin/public-config returns JSON.
esportsSportsbook.hint_network: The browser could not reach /v1/sportsbook/oddin/public-config. Confirm VITE_PLAYER_API_ORIGIN on Vercel and PLAYER_CORS_ORIGINS on the API include this site.
esportsSportsbook.hint_generic: The merged Oddin config is still invalid (for example VITE_ODDIN_* on Vercel may be wrong or incomplete). Compare your player env with docs/oddin-iframe-integration.md or fix values on the core API.

footer.seoFallbackTitle: Play Online Casino Games for Real Money at vybebet

seo.block1Heading: The best online casino you will come across in 2026
seo.block1p1: vybebet is a fast-growing crypto casino built for players who want to play online casino games for real money using cryptocurrency. With thousands of games available, the platform delivers a complete real money crypto casino experience focused on performance, variety, and transparent gameplay.
seo.block1p2: We support a wide range of immersive crypto casino games, including slots, table games, live dealers, and more.
seo.block2p1: Shows include Crazy Time, Monopoly Live, Sweet Bonanza, and many more, offering dynamic gameplay for players looking for a unique crypto casino games experience.
seo.block2subp1: vybebet features an exciting collection of games from top studios in the industry. These titles are designed to offer engaging mechanics and high-quality gameplay.

crypto.pricesNeedApiKey: Live prices need COINMARKETCAP_API_KEY in services/core/.env (then restart the API).
crypto.couldNotLoad: Could not load prices — check that the API is running.

lobby.noGamesInRow: No games in this row yet.
lobby.catalogFaultOrigin: Lobby could not load games: requests are hitting this site instead of the core API (or the response was HTML, not JSON). In Vercel → Environment Variables set VITE_PLAYER_API_ORIGIN to your public API URL (no trailing slash) and redeploy. On the API host, include your player URL in PLAYER_CORS_ORIGINS (e.g. https://*.vercel.app).
lobby.catalogFaultCors: Lobby could not load games: the browser could not reach the API (often CORS or network). Confirm VITE_PLAYER_API_ORIGIN points to your live core API. On core, set PLAYER_CORS_ORIGINS to include this origin (e.g. https://*.vercel.app for previews).
lobby.catalogFaultApi: Lobby could not load games: the API returned an error or invalid data. Check that the core service is healthy and GET /v1/games works for integration=blueocean.
lobby.searchAriaLabel: Search games by title or studio

gameLobby.miniPlayerBody: The game is in the floating window. Close it or expand to bring it back here.
gameLobby.errorStagingHint1: This is common in staging when the provider sandbox is down or IP-blocked.
gameLobby.errorStagingHint2: Check your connection or try again. If this persists, contact support.

error.maintenance: The site is in maintenance mode. Try again later.
error.geo_blocked: Games are not available in your region.
error.self_excluded: Your account is self-excluded from play.
error.bog_unconfigured: Games are not available (provider not configured).
error.providerRefusedFreePlay: The provider refused free play for this title right now (sandbox limits, staging, or a temporary outage). You can try real money play if your wallet is funded, or try again later.
error.demo_unavailable: Demo play is not available for this game.
error.unauthorized: Your session expired or is invalid. Sign out and sign in again, then reopen this game.

gameLobby.descriptionFallback:
Step into a vivid slot inspired by folk art and mythic creatures. Spin through colourful reels, chase bonus rounds, and dial the pace to match your style.

Try demo play to learn symbols and features without risking balance. When you switch to real play, keep sessions measured—set limits, take breaks, and treat gameplay as entertainment.

Provider rules, RTP ranges, and feature availability can vary by region. This placeholder appears until your catalog supplies a description for this title.
gameLobby.statsCatalogBlurb: Rows below are the single game row tied to this lobby URL — not site-wide or brand totals.
gameLobby.statsBlueOceanBlurb: XAPI payload for the same Blue Ocean game id as above (when the provider returns it).
gameLobby.statsSubtitleLobby: Per-title data for this lobby (catalog id {{id}}).
gameLobby.providerBootHint: The provider window can stay dark for a few seconds while the game boots.

empty.featuredChallenges: No featured games — set BLUEOCEAN_FEATURED_ID_HASHES on the API (comma-separated id_hash values), then sync the catalog.
empty.searchFilters: No games match your search or filters. Try clearing filters or browse all games.
empty.category: No games in this category. Open Games for the full catalog, or run a catalog sync in the staff console if you expect titles here.
empty.staffOpsHint: Run catalog sync from the staff console (Blue Ocean ops), or check that games are not hidden.
empty.blueOceanNone: No games from the Blue Ocean catalog are visible yet.

challenges.subtitle: Hit multipliers and wagering targets to win cash and rewards. Play responsibly.

challenges.progressHintSignedOut: Sign in to enter challenges and track progress.
challenges.emptyNonePublished: No challenges are live yet. Staff publishes them in the admin console (Engagement → Challenges): turn on “Live in player app” so the status becomes scheduled or active. Draft challenges never appear here.
challenges.emptyFilter: No challenges match this filter — try All, or sign in if these are VIP-only.
challenges.footerGeneric: Play within your limits. If you need help, use your operator's responsible gambling tools.
challenges.toastGameUnavailableBody: This challenge has no linked game in the catalog yet.

modal.alreadyEnteredBody: You are already in this challenge.
modal.prizeClaimedBody: Funds were added to your cash wallet.
modal.prizeAutoCredit: When you finish, the prize is credited to your wallet automatically.
modal.prizePendingReview: Prize crediting may be pending review or already processed—check your wallet balance.
modal.preStartHint: You can accept the terms and enter once the countdown finishes. Opening times are enforced on the server.
modal.acceptTerms: I confirm I have read the rules and terms for this challenge and accept them. I am playing within my limits.

lobby.emptyLeaderboard: No entries yet. Be the first on the board.
lobby.footerWagerMode: Ranked by total qualifying wager. Time is the latest settled round we have. Refreshes about every 12s.
lobby.footerMultMode: Ranked by best win multiplier. Time is from the round that hit that multiplier when available. Refreshes about every 12s.

vipPage.lifetimeWagerBlurb: Lifetime wager from real-money spins (summed stake on each qualifying game bet). Builds toward tier unlocks.
vipPage.wagerUnlockTier: Wager to unlock your first VIP tier for scheduled bonuses
vipPage.weeklyNotEnabledTier: Weekly bonus not enabled for your VIP tier
vipPage.monthlyNotEnabledTier: Monthly bonus not enabled for your VIP tier
vipPage.offerNotAtTier: Offer not available at your tier
vipPage.signInPerksBlurb: Sign in to see your active VIP perks and any claimable tier rewards in one place.
vipPage.noPerksConfigured: No tier-specific perks are configured for your rank yet.
vipPage.noRewardsTierYet: No rewards configured for this tier yet.
vipPage.toastBonusNotPublished: This scheduled bonus is not published yet.
vipPage.toastClaimedBody: Added to My Bonuses. Normal bonus rules still apply.
vipPage.rakeInfoTip: Tier % is your passive add on eligible cash play. Periodic rakeback posts to your claimable balance (UTC schedule). Timed boost % applies only to stake during the boost window; when the boost ends that extra rakeback is booked to the same claimable balance. Claim sends the total to your cash wallet.
vipPage.rakeSignInBlurb: Sign in to see your tier rakeback and claim balance.
vipPage.rakeTierLocked: Passive rakeback is not part of your current VIP tier. It unlocks automatically when you reach a tier that includes it.
vipPage.rakeNoProgrammeData: No passive rakeback add is assigned to your tier in programme data yet.
vipPage.rakeAccruesFootnote: Accrues from eligible play; rates are tier-based.
vipPage.rakeBoostSettles: Boost tally (settles into claimable rakeback when boost ends): ~{{accrued}} on {{wager}} wager this window.
vipPage.rakeBoostInfoTip: One lightning icon per scheduled UTC window today. Green: claim open or boost running. Gray: already claimed for that window. Timed windows match your VIP tier schedule.
vipPage.rakeBoostTierLocked: Timed rakeback boosts are not included in your current tier. They activate when you reach a tier with this benefit.
vipPage.extraOnTop: Extra on top of tier rakeback when you claim
vipPage.rainBody: Community rain eligibility when the programme is live.
vipPage.rakeToastBoostActivatedBody: Your boosted rate applies for the active window.
vipPage.rakeToastClaimedBodyUpToDate: Your wallet is up to date.
